image_resolution.source: RPD paper §IV.A: human camera render at 256×256 (same as OpenVLA finetune)

max_episode_steps.source: RPD paper §IV.A: max_episode_length=300 for ManiSkill (applies to all RPD runs)

camera.source: vlagents/src/vlagents/wrappers.py:22-29; Octo trained on same human-camera data as OpenVLA

prompt_format.value: <task instruction as plain text>  # Octo uses T5 language embedding, not a template
prompt_format.source: vlagents/src/vlagents/policies.py OctoModel — passes raw instruction to Octo's tokenizer

image_flip_180deg.source: human_camera render is upright; same as OpenVLA ManiSkill path

resize_method.source: Octo processes 256×256 images; matches OpenVLA/RPD image pipeline

image_resize_before_model.source: Octo accepts 256×256 native (primary=256, wrist=128); no external resize

center_crop.source: Octo training on Juelg/RPD-maniskill dataset used no center-crop augmentation (matches OpenVLA finetune)

gripper_post_processing.value: a[-1] = a[-1] * 2 - 1.0  # rescale [0,1]→[-1,1] only; NO binarize

wait_steps.source: vlagents has no warmup; our eval uses 10 for init-pose alignment (empirically required — removing regresses to 0%)

train_seed_range.source: RPD paper §IV.A: ManiSkill PPO training samples reset seeds from a wide range; treat as superset of eval (no fixed seed reservation).

eval_seed_range.source: ManiSkill harness uses episode-index seeding starting at 0 (aligned with training distribution); num_trials=50.
